title: ScanForge paper accepted at ITC 2025
summary: Our work on learning-guided decision ordering for ATPG has been accepted to the IEEE International Test Conference. The camera-ready and reproducibility artifacts are now public.

title: US patent granted for ML-guided test generation
summary: The USPTO has granted our patent covering machine-learning-guided test pattern generation, the method at the core of the ScanForge project.

title: OpenFlow-X reaches its first reproducible tape-out flow
summary: OpenFlow-X now runs a one-command RTL-to-GDS flow on open PDKs, with a congestion surrogate in active development. Try it on GitHub.

title: Trojan detection over scan infrastructure appears at HOST
summary: TrustScan's core result — reusing scan structures for hardware Trojan detection — is now published, with benchmarks available for the community.

title: New academic collaboration on chiplet testability
summary: We are partnering with university groups to extend testability-aware chiplet partitioning to larger heterogeneous packages.

title: Research Bulletin archive goes live
summary: Every monthly bulletin is now archived in HTML, PDF, and ASCII formats, and is fully searchable from the bulletin page.
